headline: API-ISSUES.md refreshed to current Wave 1-4 state with verifier approval.
current_focus: Completed documentation cleanup; API-ISSUES.md now records closed wave work separately from the three intentionally deferred API decisions.
checks_run: git diff --check -- backend/docs/API-ISSUES.md,GOMODCACHE=/workspace/.gomodcache GOCACHE=/workspace/.gocache go test ./... -run TestOpenAPISpecValidates -count=1,git status --short -- backend/docs/API-ISSUES.md backend/docs/openapi.yaml backend/server/server.go
